data.text: THIS WORLD IS NOT QUITE A MEMBER OF THE HOME SWEET PIXEL SYSTEM, TOUGH
MY FLIGHT COMPUTER KEEPS INSISTING OTHERWISE.
ACTUALLY, THIS IS A INTERSTELLAR WANDERER WHICH HAS ALREAYD BROKEN AWAY
FROM THIS STARS GRAVITY-FIELD, AND IS NOW GOING OUT FOR A LONG, COLD
THIS SMALL ASTEROID-OBJECT IS DUSTY AND CRATERIZED, AND IT WILL TAKE A
LONG TIME 'TILL IT SEES SUNLIGHT AGAIN.
